title: hibbertia ferruginea
intro: Hibbertia ferruginea, also known as rusty cup, is a low-growing, herbaceous plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which are believed to include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hibbertia ferruginea are thought to include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and potentially aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, are sometimes used to take advantage of its purported medicinal properties.
